source: Closed GAO bid-protest decision wrapper carrier pack drafted from retained GAO public-decision fixtures and source-only oracle reviews.
purpose: Constrain GAO bid-protest decision compiles to recurring wrapper anatomy: forum, docket/B-number, procurement identifier, decision date, and compact current disposition. This pack does not attempt protest grounds, OCI analysis, CPAR detail, recommendations, or legal reasoning.

lenses.purpose: GAO bid-protest decision wrapper, forum, current docket/B-number, procurement identifier, decision date, and compact overall disposition.

predicates.notes: Identifies one source-stated GAO bid-protest decision and compact bottom-line disposition. Do not hide protest grounds, findings, recommendations, OCI/CPAR analysis, cited precedents, prior decision status, or full captions in wrapper slots.
